meta_title: For Students: SaaS starter kit to Solve no portfolio (Intermediate Idea List)
meta_description: Learn how to SaaS starter kit and overcome no portfolio. A Intermediate-level Idea List using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: SaaS starter kit to Solve no portfolio
content.seo_description: Learn how to build a SaaS starter kit and overcome the no portfolio trap. An intermediate guide using Antigravity and Claude Code for career-defining projects.
content.answer_block: The 'no portfolio' trap is a myth solved by engineering real-world utility. By building a modular SaaS starter kit, you demonstrate architectural foresight, authentication mastery, and database management. Use Antigravity to scaffold the infrastructure and Claude Code to accelerate development, turning a blank screen into a hiring-manager-ready project.
content.intro:
The blank screen stares back, a silent witness to your lack of production experience. You have the theory, the tutorials, and the ambition, but your GitHub profile is a graveyard of abandoned 'To-Do' apps that prove nothing to a potential employer. You aren't just lacking code; you are lacking a narrative of professional competence.

This is the turning point. By building a production-grade SaaS starter kit, you move from being a student who follows instructions to an engineer who solves problems. We will leverage high-velocity tools like Antigravity and Claude Code to bypass the boilerplate tedium, allowing you to focus on the complex logic that separates juniors from senior-level talent.

steps.title: Define the SaaS Architecture
steps.description: Establish the core stack. We define user roles, subscription tiers, and database schema to ensure the app is extensible from day one.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a modern SaaS architecture using Next.js, Supabase, and Stripe. Include a robust user authentication flow with role-based access control and a multi-tenant database schema.

steps.title: Implement Secure Authentication
steps.description: Don't just use a library; build a secure session management layer that handles refresh tokens and persistent state.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure secure session management using Supabase Auth. Implement middleware to protect private routes and handle redirects for unauthenticated users.

steps.title: Integrate Subscription Logic
steps.description: The heart of a SaaS is the billing engine. We integrate Stripe webhooks to handle subscription lifecycle events.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a Stripe webhook listener that updates the user subscription status in the Supabase database upon successful payment events.

steps.title: Build the User Dashboard
steps.description: Create a clean, responsive UI that displays user-specific data. This is your chance to show off your front-end polish.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Build a responsive dashboard layout using Tailwind CSS. Include a sidebar navigation, data-table view for user resources, and a profile settings page.

steps.title: Deploy and Automate
steps.description: A project isn't real until it's live. We configure CI/CD pipelines to ensure every push is tested and deployed.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a GitHub Actions workflow for automated testing and deployment to Vercel, including environment variable management.

pro_tips: Always build for multi-tenancy from day one; it demonstrates you understand how scalable business software actually works.
Use Zod for schema validation on both the client and server to eliminate 'undefined' errors at the root.
Document your architectural decisions in a README.md; hiring managers care more about your 'why' than your 'how'.
Implement an error boundary early to ensure your app fails gracefully, a hallmark of senior-level engineering.
Focus on one 'hero' feature that solves a specific user pain point rather than bloating the app with generic CRUD.
content.next_steps: Once your starter kit is deployed, add a custom domain and build one unique micro-service on top of it. This will transform your starter kit into a live, functional product that users can sign up for, effectively killing the 'no portfolio' problem forever.
content.conversion_block: You now have the blueprint to stop building tutorials and start building a career. Stop waiting for permission to be an engineer. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
